title: Scorpio July 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
excerpt: Scorpio July 2026 horoscope: Cancer New Moon in your 9th house of belief + Aquarius Full Moon in your 4th of home. Crystal of the Month: Rose Quartz.
rank_math_title: Scorpio July 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Scorpio July 2026 monthly horoscope — key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Rose Quartz). Cancer New Moon Jul 13; Aquarius Full Moon Jul 29.
content:
Scorpio July 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeHome and community — belief widens, then a home or family climax
Key DatesNew Moon Jul 13 (Cancer, 9th house) / Mercury Rx ends Jul 23 / Full Moon Jul 29 (Aquarius, 4th house)
Love9th house New Moon supports long-distance and belief-aligned love
Career4th house Full Moon asks whether home supports the work
Crystal of the MonthRose Quartz
Lucky ColorsDeep maroon, black, soft rose
Lucky Number9
AffirmationI let the view widen; the home adjusts to hold the new me.

This Month's Energy

Scorpio, July 2026 begins with belief, ends with home. Mercury remains retrograde in Cancer (your 9th house of belief, study, and long journeys) until July 23, continuing the worldview review June began. The New Moon in Cancer on July 13 also falls in your 9th house, doubling the belief-and-study emphasis. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, clearing communications. The Buck Full Moon in Aquarius on July 29 lights up your 4th house of home, family, and foundations — a climax around a living situation, a family truth, or a real-estate chapter. July's job is to widen the view early, then let the home adjust to hold the new you.

Key Dates for Scorpio in July 2026

DateTransitMeaning for ScorpioDo / Avoid
Jul 13New Moon in Cancer9th house — fresh start in belief, study, publishing, foreign connections, long journeysDo: book the trip, take the course, publish the essay, romance a foreign idea
Avoid: defending a worldview you've outgrown
Jul 23Mercury turns directBelief and travel communications finally clear; plans unblockDo: send the proposal, book the trip, sign the contract (carefully)
Avoid: expecting instant clarity — give it a few days
Jul 29Full Moon in Aquarius (Buck Moon)4th house — home, family, foundations climax; a living situation or family truth peaksDo: name the family truth, document housing agreements, make the home change
Avoid: signing a lease or moving during the Full Moon intensity without review
Jul 1–22Mercury Rx continues (Cancer, 9th house)Belief and worldview under review; old certainties questionedDo: rest, journal on worldview, read the challenging book
Avoid: righteous arguments, signing long-travel contracts
Jul 5Venus enters Gemini8th house Venus — deep intimate love, shared resources, psychological bondingDo: name a deeper commitment, review joint finances, allow vulnerability
Avoid: using intensity to avoid depth
Jul 22Sun enters Leo10th house season — career and public role through AugustDo: show up publicly, accept visible roles, network upward
Avoid: hiding your power

Career & Money

For Scorpio, July's career story is backloaded. Mercury Rx in your 9th house of belief and long-view work continues to surface questions: does your career align with what you actually believe? Use the early weeks to read, study, and revise. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, clearing the path.

The Sun in Leo from July 22 (your 10th house of career and public reputation) supports visibility and leadership through August. The Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 falls in your 4th house of home and foundations — many Scorpios will need to adjust the home base to support the public year ahead (a move, a renovation, a clearer family arrangement). With Chiron now in your 7th house (since June 19), partnership patterns also surface at work. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is patient documentation through Mercury Rx, then bold action after July 23.

Love & Relationships

The New Moon in Cancer on July 13 falls in your 9th house of belief and long journeys. For Scorpio, this is a love doorway: long-distance romance, attraction to foreign perspectives, belief-aligned partnership. Single Scorpios may meet someone through travel or study; coupled Scorpios may explore a shared belief or long trip together.

Venus entering Gemini on July 5 (your 8th house) deepens intimacy and shared resources — name a deeper commitment or restructure joint finances. With Chiron in your 7th house (since June 19), the deeper work continues: healing partnership wounds so the right partnership can root. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting belief lead, not just intensity.

Health & Wellness

July's first three weeks favor study and rest. Mercury Rx in your 9th house can surface worldview questions and old certainties — gentle reading and journaling are medicine now. Many Scorpios need more time alone in early July; honor it.

The Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 falls in your 4th house of home and foundations — a climax around a living situation. Home is wellness for Scorpio; if your space doesn't support your nervous system, this is the moment to make a change. Rose Quartz, your crystal of the month, holds the heart steady through the worldview-and-home transition. Scorpio tends to carry tension in the reproductive and excretory systems; hydration and gentle movement are medicine. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Rose Quartz

Why Rose Quartz fits Scorpio this month. You are Mars- and Pluto-ruled, and July asks for softness on two fronts: belief (9th house New Moon) and home (4th house Full Moon). Rose Quartz, traditionally tied to unconditional love, the heart chakra, and emotional harmony, is the stone that warms the heart through the worldview-and-home transition. Where Moonstone (June's stone) cooled and received, Rose Quartz opens and warms — exactly what belief-shifts and home-changes require.

How to use it during July 2026. Place Rose Quartz in the center of your home (the 4th house area) on July 13 (the 9th-house New Moon) and leave it there through the 4th house Full Moon on July 29. Hold it over your heart for 5 minutes of breathing during worldview or family conversations.

Best date to use it: July 29, the Aquarius Full Moon in your 4th house — Rose Quartz over your heart during a 10-minute evening practice, naming the home truth you're ready to claim.

Read more: Rose Quartz Meaning and Best Crystals for Scorpio.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Scorpio — July 2026

When: July 29, the Aquarius Full Moon in your 4th house.
Crystal: Rose Quartz.
Intention: Let the home adjust to hold the new you; release the old foundation gently.

  1. Cleanse Rose Quartz under cool running water for 30 seconds on the evening of July 29.
  2. Set the intention on the 4th house theme: write down one home truth you're ready to name — a living change, a family pattern to release, a foundation to rebuild.
  3. Act by making one concrete home change within 30 days of the Full Moon — a clear, a move, a family conversation. Rose Quartz in your pocket during the change.
  4. Reflect at the next New Moon (August): what belief did the home change support, and what wider view is it asking for? Carry Rose Quartz during the review.

Shop Scorpio Crystals for July 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Scorpio crystal guide for stones connected with depth, protection, transformation, and emotional healing — including the Rose Quartz that warms the heart during a worldview-and-home month. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Scorpio July 2026

Is July 2026 a good month for Scorpio?

Yes — the first three weeks favor belief and study work (9th house Mercury Rx + New Moon). Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, and the 4th house Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 brings a home or family climax.

How should Scorpio handle Mercury Rx (in your 9th house, continuing from June) until July 23?

Belief, study, and travel communications remain scrambled. Read the challenging book, journal on worldview, but wait until after July 23 to book long trips or sign study contracts.

What does the Cancer New Moon on July 13 mean for Scorpio?

It falls in your 9th house of belief, study, and long journeys — a fresh start in worldview. Book the trip, take the course, publish the essay, romance a foreign idea.

What is the best crystal for Scorpio in July 2026?

Rose Quartz — it warms the heart through belief-and-home transitions, perfectly matched to a 9th-house New Moon and a 4th-house Full Moon. See the full Scorpio crystal guide →

How will the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 affect Scorpio home life?

It falls in your 4th house of home and family — a climax around a living situation, family truth, or real-estate chapter. Name the family truth; make the home change.

Should Scorpio move or sign a lease in July 2026?

If possible, wait until after July 23. Mercury Rx through the 23rd scrambles housing paperwork. The 4th house Full Moon on July 29 supports housing decisions made with care after that date.
